items.title: Digital push, regulatory tailwinds spark rush for mutual fund licences
items.description: Industry is drawing a fresh wave of entrants even as scale, profitability remain key challenges

items.title: Stuck with losses in Gold, Silver ETFs? Here's what investors should do
items.description: Silver ETFs plunged up to 20 per cent today, extending their rout into a third straight trading session. Gold ETFs, too, followed suit as Gold and Silver prices fell by 3-6 per cent on MCX today

items.title: Longer-horizon debt funds lose return edge over shorter-duration peers
items.description: As the surge in g-sec yields remains a drag on long-duration and g-sec scheme performance

items.title: Budget 2026-27: Mutual fund industry seeks capital gains relief
items.description: Urges Centre to roll back recent tax changes on debt schemes

items.title: Retail investors getting modest returns from equity holdings: Report
items.description: Holdings have delivered barely positive returns amid a prolonged market correction, says KIE study

items.title: Jio BlackRock AMC attracts 1 million investors, 18% are first-time entrants
items.description: The first of these new launches will be the JioBlackRock Sector Rotation Fund, with its new fund offer (NFO) opening on January 27 and closing on February 9

items.title: Smallcap mutual funds looking to distance from stocks beyond top 1,000
items.description: Their exposure just 2% of scheme corpus, finds study

items.title: New MF rules from April 1: Sebi allows performance-linked expense charging
items.description: The revised regulations, approved at Sebi's December board meeting, will come into effect from April 1, 2026

items.title: Growth momentum in direct mutual funds sustains even as markets wobble
items.description: Individual investors' AUM in direct plan soars 43% in 2025, far outpacing 11% growth in regular plan

items.title: Equity mutual fund inflows slip over 6% to ₹28,054 crore in December
items.description: While equity inflows softened sequentially from Rs 29,911 crore in November, though it remained higher than Rs 24,690 crore in October

items.title: Mutual fund AUM surges 18% in 2025, slowest in 3 years: Amfi data
items.description: Led by ICICI Pru, top four AMCs add over Rs 6 trillion to combined AUM

items.title: Mutual funds' net equity purchases surged 13% in 2025, shows data
items.description: Mutual funds pumped a record ₹4.9 trillion into equities in 2025, driven by strong SIP inflows and retail participation despite volatile markets

items.title: Ashika Group gets Sebi's in-principle nod to launch mutual fund biz
items.description: Ashika Group on Wednesday announced that it has received in-principle approval from the markets regulator, Sebi, to launch mutual funds.

items.title: Retail rush, SIPs drive ₹14 trn jump in mutual fund assets in 2025
items.description: Going ahead, fund flows are likely to be guided by valuations and global developments, with investors increasingly favouring large-cap, diversified and hybrid strategies

items.title: MF investor additions hit slow lane in 2025 as equity volatility bites
items.description: Industry adds 5.8 million investors this year compared to 10.6 million in 2024

items.title: Select debt schemes extend winning run in 2025 on rate-cut tailwinds
items.description: Select debt mutual fund categories such as medium duration and floater funds have delivered over 8 per cent returns in the past year, supported by rate cuts and falling yields

items.title: Time to be neither overly greedy nor excessively fearful: Fund managers
items.description: Indian equities are consolidating valuations and recalibrating expectations about earnings, putting investors in a familiar dilemma: Lean into optimism or retreat with caution?

items.title: CIOs signal earnings-led market ahead, urge realistic return expectations
items.description: India's top fund managers expect the domestic equity market to move into a steadier, earnings-driven phase after a prolonged period of sharp rallies followed by 13-14 months of consolidation

items.title: Digital push, new investors to shape next phase of MF growth: Experts
items.description: India's MF industry believes it is still only at foothills of its potential. The next phase will be driven by the rise of digital platforms and improved discipline in SIPs, said five industry leaders

items.title: Quant-based funds emerge as new battleground for mutual fund investors
items.description: Although quant and factor strategies are expanding rapidly, investor participation held back by their complexity and inconsistent returns

items.title: Exam fear: SIF scale-up runs into distribution hurdle amid tough norms
items.description: Fund houses rolling out SIF are facing distribution challenges as stringent certification norms sharply limit eligible distributors, prompting the industry to seek regulatory relaxations

items.title: Dream Money integrates with ONDC to roll out mutual fund distribution
items.description: Dream Money, the fintech arm of Dream Sports, has integrated with the ONDC network to enable nationwide mutual fund distribution, signalling a sharper focus on investment products
